studies.risk_class: Risk Class I according to MDR
studies.duration_additional_info: Participants were required to use the app for at least 12 weeks and answer questions at four time points over a minimum of 12 weeks.
studies.intervention_and_control_group: Intervention group: Access to the full version of the App. Control group: Standard of Care and no application of the App Cara Care für Reizdarm or an alternative App.
studies.additional_info_about_trial_arms: Arm 1 (Intervention): Access to the full version of the App. Arm 2 (Control): Standard of Care and no application of the App Cara Care für Reizdarm or an alternative App.
studies.collected_data: Irritable Bowel Syndrome - Severity Scoring System (IBS-SSS), Quality of life (IBS-QOL), Work and activity impairment (WPAI-IBS), Health literacy (HLS-EU-Q16), Perception of anxiety (GAD-7), Perception of depressiveness (PHQ-9). Data was collected using standardized health questionnaires.

audit.study_title: DiGA Cara Care für Reizdarm - Evaluation of a non-invasive, non-additionally burdensome, prospective, multicentered, two-armed, randomized trial with parallel group design
audit.note: registry-only: outcome measures captured under collected_data; no reported results
